## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff` / `mypy` / `pytest` pass
- [ ] **Cross-model peer review** requested — reviewer model differs from author model (see `docs/PEER_REVIEW.md`)
- [ ] No secrets / PII / real resumes committed
- [ ] Never-fabricate guardrail respected (no auto-answers to EEO / visa / clearance fields)
- [ ] Docs / backlog updated if behavior changed
